mnemonics: Nerve Cells Learn, Seeing Patterns Regularly (for Neural Network Layers: Input, Convolution, Leaky ReLU, Softmax, Pooling, Recurrent)
keyPoints: Supervised learning uses labeled data; unsupervised finds hidden patterns.
A neural network's hidden layers perform feature extraction.
Overfitting occurs when a model learns the training data too well, including its noise, and fails on new data.
commonMistakes: Confusing Classification (categorical output) with Regression (continuous output).
Assuming more data always solves overfitting; better feature engineering or regularization is often needed.
Using Accuracy as the sole metric for imbalanced datasets; Precision, Recall, or F1-score are better.
